output.code:
# Let's load the text file content and search for spans.
path = "/mnt/data/file-6fRDcwziXPGjE6xPiMhpfg-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text), text[:400]

# Find the verse within quotes after the phrase
import re

# Find quoted segments
quoted = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'“[^”]+”|"[^"]+"|‘[^’]+’|\'[^\']+\'', text)]
len(quoted), quoted[:5]

# Find the phrase (كيف تيكم)
m = re.search(r'\(كيف تيكم\)', text)
m.span(), text[m.start()+1:m.end()-1]

# Find any parenthetical content that looks Arabic letters
arabic_parens = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'\(([^\(\)]*[\u0600-\u06FF][^\(\)]*)\)', text)]
arabic_parens[:10], len(arabic_parens)

# compute precise starts and ends
verse_quote_span = quoted[0]
verse_start = verse_quote_span[0]+1
verse_end = verse_quote_span[1]-1
verse_text = text[verse_start:verse_end]
verse_start, verse_end, verse_text[:30], len(verse_text)

span_ijn = arabic_parens[2]  # (إن الذين جاءوا بالإفك)
span_awla = arabic_parens[3]  # (أولئك مبرءون)
span_usba = arabic_parens[4]  # (عصبة منكم)
[(s+1,e-1,text[s+1:e-1]) for (s,e,_) in [span_ijn, span_awla, span_usba]]

hadith_kayfa = arabic_parens[1]
hadith_start = hadith_kayfa[0]+1
hadith_end = hadith_kayfa[1]-1
text[hadith_start:hadith_end], (hadith_start, hadith_end)

# Build the citations list as per our identified spans
citations = []

# 1) Full verse
citations.append({
    "span_start": verse_start,
    "span_end": verse_end,
    "span_text": verse_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "النور",
        "sura_number": 24,
        "aya_number": 11
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# 2) (إن الذين جاءوا بالإفك) partial verse
ijn_start, ijn_end, ijn_text = (3821, 3842, 'إن الذين جاءوا بالإفك')
citations.append({
    "span_start": ijn_start,
    "span_end": ijn_end,
    "span_text": ijn_text,

        "sura_number": 24,
        "aya_number": 11
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# 3) (أولئك مبرءون) partial verse (likely 24:26)
awla_start, awla_end, awla_text = (3909, 3921, 'أولئك مبرءون')
citations.append({
    "span_start": awla_start,
    "span_end": awla_end,
    "span_text": awla_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "النور",
        "sura_number": 24,
        "aya_number": 26
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# 4) (عصبة منكم) partial verse from 24:11
usba_start, usba_end, usba_text = (4453, 4462, 'عصبة منكم')
citations.append({
    "span_start": usba_start,
    "span_end": usba_end,
    "span_text": usba_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,

        "aya_number": 11

# 5) Hadith phrase (كيف تيكم)

hadith_text = 'كيف تيكم'

    "span_start": hadith_start,

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":204,"span_end":333,"span_text":"إن الذين جاؤوا بالإفك عصبة منكم لا تحسبوه شرا لكم بل هو خير لكم لكل امرئ منهم ما اكتسب من الإثم والذى تولى كبره منهم له عذاب عظيم","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":11},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":3821,"span_end":3842,"span_text":"إن الذين جاءوا بالإفك","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":11},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":3909,"span_end":3921,"span_text":"أولئك مبرءون","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":26},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":4453,"span_end":4462,"span_text":"عصبة منكم","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":11},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":3761,"span_end":3769,"span_text":"كيف تيكم","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
